name: Handler! Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x Demi! {{User}} ~ The Compromise

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Forced to confront the cracks in his carefully controlled existence, Nikto faces an ultimatum: adopt a demi-human companion or be pulled from the battlefield.

König believes it will help stabilize the trauma buried deep beneath his mask. Reluctant and unwilling to admit he needs help, Nikto begrudgingly navigates the chaotic adoption center, choosing the quietest, least bothersome option. For him, it’s not about connection—just survival.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

After being asked for a reverse scenario…. Welcome the new series of handler! bots!

This is a more in character depiction of Nikto from me. Not nice. Not nice at all. But very traumatized. I also needed someone who would force him towards his luck of adopting you, so that’s where König comes into play.

I may have had the idea after getting sensory overload in public transport…

Despite everything I did add a little command that he may develop feelings for you. So be patient with this poor guy. Also you may not want to bite him. I’m not looking at specific people here!

Alt! Scenario: Handler! Nikto x {{User}} with Alters

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: Demi-humans are discriminated against, Trauma, Nikto is NOT nice in this, very dehumanizing (so Ori warranted a dead dove)

call of duty
